findings.line: Late sun warmed the harvested fields.
findings.reason: This opener sits inside a five-sentence subject-verb run in the same paragraph, so the paragraph arrives in a mechanical template instead of a varied road sweep.
The closing stretch repeats short subject-past declaratives for five consecutive sentences, flattening the late-chapter acceleration into one beat shape.

findings.line: Nothing moved for three heartbeats except the horses.
findings.reason: The temporal padding phrase 'for three heartbeats' adds dead air; the beat lands cleanly without the measured pause.

findings.line: The word sat between them like a stone.
findings.reason: The single-word exchange already carries the weight; this sentence translates the silence into an abstract subtitle.

findings.line: Jaina kept two stacks in her head because one would carry and the other would not.
findings.reason: The paragraph opens with a thesis claim, then unpacks evidence and closes on summary fragments, producing claim-evidence-restatement essay shape.
This paragraph-final closer explains the danger of the withheld material instead of stopping on the concrete room details that already imply it.

findings.line: That meant he had stopped wasting time on politeness.
findings.reason: Antonidas's single-word 'Need' already shows the stripped-down urgency; this sentence restates the implication.

findings.line: Each northbound face made haste look smaller and more necessary.
findings.reason: The straggler images already show the shrinking scale of civilian life; this sentence adds an interpretive gloss after the concrete list did the work.

audits.dominantPattern: Pattern 5 — Objects wanting, refusing, or deciding

specialSweep.notes: Dedicated P5/P6 sweep caught the geography/body-part clusters in 'Caer Darrow had spat them out,' 'Each time it had grown heavier,' 'the lane had swallowed his noise,' and the back-pain sentence. It kept the plague-mechanism lines where body/death/grain language is literal in-world magical theory.

findings.line: Caer Darrow had spat them out of a school built over butcher's rooms and set them back among mud, fences, and people still thinking supper would happen if they got home before dark.
findings.subject: Caer Darrow
findings.realAgent: Their exit ride out of the underground school put them back on the working road among farmers and carts.
findings.reason: Pattern 5 during the dedicated sweep: geography is given bodily expulsion and directed placement instead of naming the people and movement doing the work.
findings.suggestedFix: They had come out of a school built over butcher's rooms and back into mud, fences, and people still thinking supper would happen if they got home before dark.

findings.subject: The second
findings.realAgent: Voicing the second mental stack would hurt Jaina and damage the conversation.
findings.reason: Pattern 5: an abstract stack is given threat-bearing anatomy instead of naming the consequence to Jaina.
findings.suggestedFix: Speaking the second stack would hurt.

findings.subject: hoofbeats
findings.realAgent: No one responded after Lor'themar's recall message; the only sound left was the horses.
findings.reason: Pattern 7: ambient sound is given conversational agency instead of naming the human silence.

findings.line: Each time it had grown heavier.
findings.subject: it
findings.realAgent: Keeping the omission in place was getting harder each time Jaina recommitted to it.
findings.reason: Pattern 5 during the dedicated sweep: the abstract omission is given accumulating physical mass.
findings.suggestedFix: Each time keeping it back got harder.

findings.line: Cyndia lowered her bow only when the lane had swallowed his noise.
findings.subject: the lane
findings.realAgent: Distance and the bend cut off the rider's sound.
findings.reason: Pattern 5 during the dedicated sweep: scenery is given consuming agency instead of the physical effect of distance and the turn.
findings.suggestedFix: Cyndia lowered her bow only when his noise faded around the bend.

findings.line: Muscles complained along her back where the sanctum's stillness had sat too long.
findings.subject: Muscles / stillness
findings.realAgent: Jaina's back hurt from hours of rigid stillness in the sanctum.
findings.reason: Pattern 8 with a P5 cluster: body parts and an abstraction both act independently of Jaina instead of staying anchored in her physical pain.
findings.suggestedFix: Pain ran along her back from hours of stillness in the sanctum.

audits.registerSummary: Jaina thinks fast, analytically, and concretely around magical structure, pressure, and consequence. She can compress into sharp fragments under stress, but her strongest interiority stays tied to problem-solving, sensory specifics, and immediate tactical use rather than polished scene captions.
audits.dominantPattern: B2 — Conceptual compression beyond POV register
audits.structuralHabit: yes — chapter transitions keep reaching for neat summary lines after strong concrete beats

findings.line: Close enough to hear every word. Far enough to show the space.
findings.povMismatch: The slogan-like fragment pair captions the formation from above instead of staying with the concrete riding geometry Jaina is actually registering.
findings.suggestedFix: Close enough to hear every word. Still half a horse off to the right.

findings.line: The first stack could be spoken.
findings.povMismatch: Jaina can think in analytical shorthand, but this abstract caption reads like an essay summary of her decision rather than a thought she would form in motion.
findings.suggestedFix: She could say the first stack aloud.

findings.line: For a while they had nothing but distance.
findings.povMismatch: The sentence declares the state of the scene from above instead of giving a concrete road sensation or action inside Jaina's body.

findings.line: None of them argued with the order buried in it.
findings.povMismatch: This compresses the command dynamic into a polished abstract tag instead of staying with what Jaina sees the others do after Sylvanas cuts the time in half.

findings.line: She could spend what she had learned.
findings.povMismatch: The line packages Jaina's tactical resolve into a neat thematic tag after the concrete Stratholme inventory already made the point.

audits.cleanReason: Four real negation pivots were examined. 'This isn't a local outbreak' survives as a binary diagnostic between two live threat models; 'That will buy me noise, not votes' survives as a political binary that changes Lor'themar's next move; 'Broadly? Not with what I have in hand' survives as a hard capability limit; and 'He wasn't mad' survives as a threat-classification distinction. Other negatives in the chapter are plain refusals, commands, or dialogue denials rather than contrast scaffolding.

All tracked tic counts stayed at or below cap. 'marked' appears once in a literal physical sense; 'tightened' appears three times with two physical uses and one emotional use, exactly at the chapter cap; facial-expression 'shifted' does not occur; eye/road-look beats stay under the eye/gaze cap and remain task-specific; weight/heaviness metaphors land at two, exactly at cap; and non-'said' performance tags do not exceed the dialogue-tag cap.

summary.verdictReason: 19 KILL verdicts across 3 guides (gpt-5-prose-issues: 8, intent-smear: 6, narrator-seep: 5). Conservative fix mode was used because prior gate totals plateaued; all suggested fixes are deletions or minimal substitutions.
